title: Short title
doc_html:
PART V.  UNIFORM INTERNATIONAL CHILD ABDUCTION

PREVENTION ACT

SUBPART A.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

§1851.  Short title

This Part may be cited as the Uniform International Child Abduction Prevention Act.

Acts 2007, No. 369, §1.
